index.title: Suppression list
index.description: Addresses that will not be mailed for this workspace.
index.emptyFilteredMessage: No suppressed addresses match the current filter.
index.emptyMessage: Bounces and complaints are added here automatically. You can also add an address manually.

remove.successToast: Address removed from the suppression list.
remove.confirmDescription: will become mailable again and may receive future campaigns.

addDialog.title: Add an address
addDialog.description: The address will be skipped on all future sends until you remove it.
addDialog.successToast: Address added to the suppression list.

settings.title: Bounce-action settings
settings.description: Control how this workspace reacts to delivery feedback.
settings.hardBounceDescription: When on, an address that hard-bounces is added to the suppression list automatically. Turning this off lets the workspace keep mailing addresses that permanently reject mail, which damages sender reputation.
settings.complaintDescription: When on, an address that reports a message as spam is added to the suppression list automatically. Turning this off lets the workspace keep mailing recipients who have complained, which damages sender reputation and deliverability.
